name: Morning Brew
tagline: Kailua's beloved bohemian coffeehouse — strong wifi, all-day breakfast, 100% Hawaiian-roasted coffee.
parking: Parking in the Kailua Shopping Center lot — free and usually easy
talkStory: This is where Kailua moms, surfers, and remote workers all converge. Weekend mornings are packed with post-beach regulars. Jim is often around and loves talking coffee sourcing. Pair with a Kailua Beach morning — park at the lot, grab coffee first, then walk to the beach (10 min). Good WiFi and plenty of outlets — one of the best remote work spots on the Windward side.
